name: hypo-workflow
description: Serialized prompt workflow with planning, execution, auditing, debugging, release automation, and native command skills.

interface.shortDescription: Plan-to-release workflow automation with native skills and progress tracking.
interface.longDescription: Hypo-Workflow packages a complete planning and execution workflow with native skills, smart stop hooks, dual plan modes, progress summaries, and serial subagent orchestration from a local .pipeline workspace.
